title: Joomla migration without SEO loss: a 12-year-old case study
lede: A 12-year-old Joomla 2.5 site, three SEF plugins deep, moving to PHP 8.2 hosting. Here's how the redirects, the database, and the rankings survived the week.
hero_alt: Rolled antique nautical chart on oak with brass dividers and a small red wax seal on a paper tag.
